student-management-collections.overview:
Student CRUD with sorting and search using collections.

Features to build:
• Add Student
• Remove Student
• Search Student
• Sort Student
• Display Student

Requirements:
• Use ArrayList
• Use Comparator for sorting

Bonus:
• Filter by department
student-management-collections.explanation: Student Management System is a intermediate-level project (Week 5). Use the verified GitHub repository for real source code and the YouTube tutorial to learn step by step. Build: Add Student, Remove Student, Search Student, Sort Student, Display Student.
student-management-collections.studyNote:
1. Watch the YouTube tutorial first.
2. Open the GitHub repo — clone or browse the source.
3. Build your version feature-by-feature in IntelliJ.
4. Test each feature before moving on.
5. Mark complete when your project works end-to-end.

library-book-management.overview:
Library system with book issue/return using ArrayList and HashMap.

Features to build:
• Add Book
• Remove Book
• Search Book
• Issue Book
• Return Book

Requirements:
• Use ArrayList for books
• Use HashMap for issued books tracking

Bonus:
• Due date tracking
library-book-management.explanation: Library Book Management is a intermediate-level project (Week 5). Use the verified GitHub repository for real source code and the YouTube tutorial to learn step by step. Build: Add Book, Remove Book, Search Book, Issue Book, Return Book.

employee-directory.overview:
Employee lookup and filtering with HashMap and ArrayList.

Features to build:
• Employee Search
• Department Filter
• Salary Sort
• Employee ID Lookup

Requirements:
• Use HashMap for ID lookup
• Use ArrayList for employee list

Bonus:
• Export department report

online-shopping-cart.overview:
Shopping cart with product management using List and Map.

Features to build:
• Add Product
• Remove Product
• Quantity
• Total Price
• Cart Summary

Requirements:
• Use List for cart items
• Use Map for product catalog

Bonus:
• Apply discount codes

hospital-appointment.overview:
Patient queue and appointment management with Queue and HashMap.

Features to build:
• Queue Patients
• Doctor Allocation
• Priority Cases
• Appointment History

Requirements:
• Use Queue and PriorityQueue
• Use HashMap for doctor-patient mapping

Bonus:
• Emergency priority handling
